description_long: This is a black and white utility pickup truck with a crew cab and a specialized service body. The front features a black hood and grille, with amber marker lights on the roof and a wide windshield. The sides reveal four doors, black wheels, and a white utility bed with multiple storage compartments and handles, designed for carrying tools and equipment. The rear view shows a rectangular cargo bed with a recessed section and red tail lights, as well as a robust bumper. The truck's body is primarily constructed from metal, with glass windows and rubber tires. Its utilitarian design suggests it is intended for work-related tasks in urban or industrial environments.
description: A black and white crew cab utility pickup truck with a service body, multiple storage compartments, and a recessed cargo bed. Designed for work and tool transport in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black hood, grille, windshield, and amber roof marker lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door cab, black wheels, and white utility bed with storage compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the recessed cargo bed, red tail lights, and robust bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the crew cab, utility bed, and additional storage compartments.
